recipe.title: Lemon Butter Orecchiette with Burrata

ingredients.name: orecchiette pasta
ingredients.note: Creator override: cup-shaped orecchiette instead of spaghetti for glossy sauce pockets.

ingredients.name: salted or unsalted butter
ingredients.note: Split across brown butter sauce and caper crumb topping.

ingredients.name: lemon zest
ingredients.note: Primary aroma driver; micro-planed curls for ASMR hook.

ingredients.name: lemon juice
ingredients.note: Added off heat after garlic; sharp steam hiss on contact.

ingredients.name: unsalted butter (topping)
ingredients.note: Combined with oil for crispy caper crumb.

ingredients.name: breadcrumbs (panko)
ingredients.note: Toasts to golden crisp in caper crumb.

ingredients.name: capers
ingredients.note: Fry until crisp in crumb mixture.

ingredients.name: crushed red pepper flakes
ingredients.note: Warm red specks in golden crumb.

ingredients.name: grated parmesan
ingredients.note: Melts into caper crumb; extra for finish.

ingredients.name: dry thyme or herbes de Provence
burrata cheese
ingredients.note: Each ball about 8-10 cm; tear to reveal creamy stracciatella interior.

ingredients.name: raw pistachios
ingredients.note: Creator add-on: dry-toasted then roughly chopped for crunch topping.

ingredients.name: pasta cooking water
ingredients.note: Starchy water to emulsify lemon butter with orecchiette.

steps.visualCue: pistachios turn deeper green-gold with oily sheen in dry skillet
steps.textureCue: dry nut crackle shifting to warm roasted snap
steps.runwayRisk: burned bitter nuts if heat too high

steps.visualCue: rough emerald crumb pile on board
steps.runwayRisk: dust cloud instead of visible pieces

steps.visualCue: rolling boil, pasta cups opening, al dente drain with steam
steps.runwayRisk: wrong pasta shape or mushy collapse

steps.visualCue: golden panko, fried capers, parmesan melt
steps.runwayRisk: soggy crumb or giant caper blobs

steps.visualCue: foaming amber butter, garlic fragrance, lemon juice hiss
steps.runwayRisk: split greasy sauce or burned garlic

steps.visualCue: orecchiette cups catch glossy lemon butter
steps.textureCue: each cup holds shiny sauce pool
steps.runwayRisk: clumpy pasta pile without cup definition

steps.visualCue: burrata tear, caper crumb shower, pistachio scatter, basil fall
steps.textureCue: cream meets crunch meets citrus gloss
steps.runwayRisk: burrata scale drift or flooded plate

assumptions: Pasta is served in one wide shallow ceramic bowl about 24-26 cm diameter on the Licorn terrazzo island, not a deep restaurant pasta plate.
One burrata ball (8-10 cm) per hero serving; video focuses on a single seductive portion with optional second ball off-frame.
Orecchiette quantity fills the bowl about two-thirds deep after toss for visible cup geometry.
Food-porn tone: glossy sauce, creamy burrata spill, audible crunch layers; no tutorial ingredient lineup opening.
criticalTransformations: Butter browning from pale yellow foam to nutty amber with milk solids specks
Garlic fragrance bloom without char blackening
Lemon juice emulsifying into hot brown butter with sharp steam release
Panko and capers frying to golden crisp crumb with parmesan melt
Dry pistachios roasting to deeper green-gold with oily nut sheen
Orecchiette al dente cups opening then coating in glossy lemon butter emulsion
Burrata skin tear releasing creamy stracciatella over hot pasta
visualTextureOpportunities: Micro-planed lemon zest curling off bright yellow peel
Brown butter foam bubbles popping with amber specks
Roasted pistachio rough chop with emerald and gold fragments
Caper crumb scoop raining golden crunch
Orecchiette cups pooling glossy lemon butter
Burrata tear with slow creamy spill over steamy pasta
Basil chiffonade landing on white burrata and yellow pasta
Fork twirl lifting sauced orecchiette with sauce thread
possibleHooks: Lemon zest ribbon curling into foaming brown butter (texture-first, paid off by sauce segment)
Burrata tear with creamy interior spilling onto glossy orecchiette
Golden caper crumb shower with audible crunch ASMR
Roasted pistachio scatter contrasting soft burrata cream
